## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss challenges and potential improvements in content creation for Aembit, focusing on technical accuracy and capturing the company's unique perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content struggles to capture Aembit's unique voice and deep technical perspective, especially compared to engineer-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Exploring alternative content sources (e.g., internal demos, engineer discussions) could provide richer context for writers](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Broadening content scope to adjacent topics of interest to the target audience may yield better results](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [More proactive communication between GrowthX and Aembit teams could improve content quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Difficulty in replicating the depth and perspective of engineer-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Industry-specific terminology (e.g., non-human identities vs. credentials) causing confusion](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Content often lacks Aembit's inherent perspective and voice](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Previous attempts with technical contractors yielded unsatisfactory results](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Potential Solutions

  - [Leverage internal resources:](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Record engineer demos and all-hands meetings](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [Use these recordings to extract deeper technical insights and unique perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Explore adjacent topics:](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
      - [Identify issues of interest to the target audience beyond direct product promotion](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
      - [Use social listening tools (e.g., Brand24) to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Improve communication:](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [More direct feedback on rejected topics](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Increase proactive communication between GrowthX and Aembit teams](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Shifted focus from "workload identities" to "non-human identities" based on industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Now aiming to differentiate Aembit's approach within the non-human identity space](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Balancing between owning the topic and exploring adjacent areas of interest to the audience](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Audience-Centric Approach

  - [Goal: Create content that makes life easier for the target audience](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Focus on solving challenges without overtly promoting Aembit's solutions](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Identify and address topics that resonate with DevOps and security professionals dealing with non-human identities](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to conduct further research and fact-finding to better understand Aembit's unique challenges](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Explore ways to access and utilize internal Aembit resources (demos, engineer discussions) for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Investigate use of social listening tools and other research methods to identify relevant topics and audience interests](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Increase proactive communication between GrowthX and Aembit teams, especially regarding feedback on content and rejected topics](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Continue iterating on content strategy to find a balance between technical depth and broader appeal](https://fathom.video/share/mVpXe6fednNvSZFUCiwK-ijTkJ1_HsjL?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
